abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Demise (Upheaval)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, this model may summon a golem Academic model with 5 health in base contact with this model.

abilities.name: Student of All
abilities.text: This model may declare attack actions printed on the stat cards of elemental allies within 10" as if they were printed on this model's stat card.

actions.name: Elemental Creation
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: Summon a gamin Academic model within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Elemental Chaos
triggers.text: Once per turn. Deal +2 damage to the target for each friendly gamin within 10" of it with a different name (maximum 6).

triggers.name: Bound to Form
triggers.text: Attach an Elemental Binds upgrade to the summoned model.

triggers.name: Revelation
triggers.text: This model gains an Insight token.

actions.name: Gathering Storm
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally with a Summon token only. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: The target moves up to 6", then declares an action.

triggers.name: Unshackled Elements
triggers.text: While resolving the generated action, the target ignores its Summon token.

triggers.name: Mantra of Binding
triggers.text: Attach an Elemental Binds upgrade to the target.

triggers.name: Elemental Detonation
triggers.text: Once per activation. Elemental only. Enemies within (p)2" of the target must pass a TN 15 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage. Then, kill the target.
